feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /news/ News: House advances bill barring sitting Congress members from buying stocks
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/22/hou se-congressional-stock-trading.html ?msockid=196670d327c565552f78675826 d66426 The U.S. House advanced legislation on Wednesday that would stop members of Congress from buying individual stocks while in office, taking the first meaningful action on an issue that has dogged lawmakers for years. The bill passed on a vote of 232-198, with more than a dozen Democrats joining Republicans in support. There is broad public support for a ban on members of Congress tra
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Just watched this. Pretty good.
entry.content: Just watched this. Pretty good.

entry.content: uhhhh... Yakuza-fags... our response?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: New image of Yeva Yasnova as 'Fae' in Seb McKinnon's medieval fantasy epic THE STOLEN CHILD
entry.content: >The film follows four unlikely heroes - The Poet, The Knight, The Horse and The Fae Princess - as they search for a lost prince and restore him to his rightful throne, in hopes of rekindling the equilibrium between the Human and Faerie worlds. >McKinnon, an artist for trading card game Magic: The Gathering, says his lush debut feature will mark a distinct shift away from the "grey, drab" color palette that has come to dominate modern fantasy films.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Games should read my mind and give me what I want at all times
entry.content: If I wanted to challenge myself and fail, I would do something else with my time and life. but unironically, i've done nothing with my life except play video games, and I'm still terrible, it's not fair
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Umamusume
entry.content: Has anyone played the new scenario yet? It came out today but I have no idea how to approach it.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 90s artwork style
entry.content: >watercolor, ink >desaturated tones >high contrasting white highlights Why did we regress from this into highly vibrant saturated slop?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gaming Gooners?
entry.content: I feel physisically, morally and ideologically repulsed by gamer gooners. Happens here on /v/ often, happens too with the obsession with gooner mods, and morons that think anyone refusing to show girls with giant tiddies is robbing them of their freedom. What's the deal with these people? Whats it take to be the type of man, that goes on a gacha game full of anime chicks, and drops 10 grand on cosmetics to coom over? Genuinely, what's causes this?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: From what I can tell, there was not a shift in staff members with the Microsoft …
entry.content: From what I can tell, there was not a shift in staff members with the Microsoft purchase. So how does simply not being part of Nintendo anymore cause a developer to go from making a dozen 9/10 games every year to never making another good game ever again?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Laurie Styvers: Spilt Milk [Warner Bros., 1971] Normally, I ignore records as ri…
entry.content: Laurie Styvers: Spilt Milk [Warner Bros., 1971] Normally, I ignore records as rightfully obscure as this one, but I thought it was time I mentioned that our hippest record company is getting more complacent all the time--just how many L.A. airheads can we stand? Styvers is the kind of person who makes me like junkies--you know, the baby you want to steal candy from, so trite and pretty-poo in her fashionably troubled adolescence that you hope she chokes on her own money. One line says it all: "T
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >kicks off the modern AI horror genre What did you think of Ex Machina? Do you l…
entry.content: >kicks off the modern AI horror genre What did you think of Ex Machina? Do you like the modern batch of AI horror movies that seems to be really blowing up right now? Favorites in the subgenre? Least favorites?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Why is /mu/core of any era such pretentious and gay garbage? It’s only popular b…
entry.content: Why is /mu/core of any era such pretentious and gay garbage? It’s only popular between here, rym and Fantano fans. It’s either shitty pop music disguised as something better like Charlie XCX, tranny electronic music like Jane Remover, babbling nigger schizo shit like Death Grips, or limp wristed and boring faggotry like Geese. What gives?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Crossing the line into the other side Emerging as prisoners To the emptiness of …
entry.content: Crossing the line into the other side Emerging as prisoners To the emptiness of time To the left and to the right From behind - they're out of sight Plunging into a newfound Age of advanced observeillance A worldwide, foolproof cage Privacy and intimacy as we know it Will be a memory Among many to be passed down To those who never knew Living in the pupil of one thousand eyes Was it overlooked in front of all our faces? Now, all the mistakes and secrets Cannot be erased Viewing the blind complex
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >2026 >we are forgotten why is rap so disposable?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google Play is now rolling out support for third-party app stores
entry.content: Google Play is now rolling out support for third-party app stores
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It intriguing to me how much the generative AI artifacts in photos, video and so…
entry.content: It intriguing to me how much the generative AI artifacts in photos, video and sound remind of the psychedelic experience. I first had this thought a decade ago when google deep dream was released but with the onset modern AI tools I've started noticing even more subtle similarities. You know the tell tale sign of AI generated voice? The kind of sharp, tensed up tone? That is identical to what all sounds sound like on LSD.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: I am trying to find an old lesbia porn video
entry.content: It was a video that had the title lesbian blondes licking in the shower. But the ones on google I am finding is not the video. It started with a thin blonde girl in a bathtub talking to one with big tits in a towel and then the big tits blonde one goes to the shower case and then the thin one goes to her and it starts. There was a bathtub and then a shower stand in the bathroom. Maybe the thin one has a tatoo on the back I don't remember. Will even send some crypto if you find
entry.dc:creator: /vip/ VIP

entry.title: /news/ News: Justice served at last
entry.content: https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles /cz97gdjgezno British woman jailed for blackmail after accusing banker of rape in Hong Kong According to local press reports, Judge Adriana Tse sentenced her to five years in prison for blackmail and three years for perverting the course of justice, with one year to be served consecutively. Prosecutors argued that Rose fabricated the allegation in an attempt to extort £100,000 ($134,000) from the man, whose identity was withheld. Rose denied the charges throug
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Painfull Failures
entry.content: ITT: we mourn what could have been What are the best examples of games that could have been great, (great concept, great dev team, etc.) but tragically ended up complete and utter disappointments and forever examples of squandered opportunity and failure to target an audience that never existed picrel >Arkane >vampires >open world RIP the possibilities if it weren't for browns/women/trannies in modern game development and the jews at microslop
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >9 movie franchise >only one of them is bad Yep . . . they don't make them like …

entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: A super underrated part of a lot of old games is how you can feel they were made…
entry.content: A super underrated part of a lot of old games is how you can feel they were made based on what the devs thought was cool, instead of being made based on internet trends or market data It's pretty crazy how you had games with dozens of devs and a production budget that were still the unique brainchild of the devs more than "cream of the crop" """indie""" games today, a lot of times while playing recent games I can tell exactly which trends they're trying to cash in and it immediately sours me on
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Its been over a year
entry.content: What do you think of 7 songs for spiders? Personally this record grew on me a lot, I hope Dax puts out more stuff, this album is clearly from a single session of song writing and isn't dipping into the reported boat load of scrapped projects he has. Just release stuff, even if it's like a solid 8 or high 7 like this one.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PoE drills?
entry.content: I’m looking for a drill I can power over Ethernet and control from home assistant. The idea is that I’d be able to position the drill and then use a voice command with my Alexa to trigger an automation in home assistant that starts or stops the drill. Saves me the hassle of having to hit the trigger every time.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: hello /g/ can you pick for me
entry.content: >laptop only has 256GB NVMe SSD >there's an unpopulated 2.5" SATA drive, but if i added an HDD for media, i couldn't upgrade the battery from 35wh to 45wh >the 35wh battery it has is basically shot i would like 2TB of lebensraum for my media library. also i heard SSDs are bad for long term lebensraum. what do you think

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >sorry our rogue AI hacked your website without us telling it to, but think of t…
entry.content: >sorry our rogue AI hacked your website without us telling it to, but think of the publicity! Is this nigger serious? And they want this AI in charge of nuclear reactors, missile silos, government agencies, mass surveillance systems and more? This is a complete mask off moment, where is the outrage? They literally committed a crime that would put any of us mere mortals in jail but instead they congratulate themselves over it and get away with it scot-free.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Sam Altman has admitted he is on a waitlist for a procedure that would digitize…
entry.content: >Sam Altman has admitted he is on a waitlist for a procedure that would digitize his brain. >The procedure would kill him. He considers this an acceptable trade for digital immortality. This is the guy making decisions about the future of AI for billions of people.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >10,000mah battery How are people okay with walking around with literal bombs in…
entry.content: >10,000mah battery How are people okay with walking around with literal bombs in their pocket? Why the obsession with making batteries as gigantic as possible? This is three Note 7s and that was already enough to burn down cars and even some guy's home.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Open Sourced Chinese AI Models Are Dangerous
entry.content: https://x.com/KS_1013/status/207961 7393463312681 Because once a majority of users are using open sourced Chinese AI models, China can just cut off access to the open sourced AI models you possess, crashing the global economy. As stated Kazuto Suzuki, an adjunct professor of technology and economics at Tokyo University.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: Suspect in attack on federal building was targeting ICE
entry.content: https://www.fox5ny.com/news/army-ve t-was-targeting-ice-fiery-attack-ou tside-nyc-federal-building-fbi NEW YORK CITY - A morning commute in Lower Manhattan erupted into chaos after a suspect ignited a fire, set off commercial fireworks and brandished a pellet gun directly outside 26 Federal Plaza, a high-security complex that houses offices for the FBI, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and federal immigration courts. The suspect, who was quickly taken into custody by federal security off
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RTS is back
entry.content: Sanctuary shattered sun takes total annihilation and actually innovates upon it with mutable terrain and water in a large scale resulting in a dynamic map. The demo is pretty good. This is definitely what the genre needs.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Hector (Release date TBD)
entry.content: >Hector (Noel Gugliemi) served his country as an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, all he wants is a quiet life in Los Angeles—running his auto repair shop, grilling in the backyard, and raising his family. But when a ruthless South American cartel affiliate rolls into the neighborhood aiming to claim the block through fear and violence, Hector’s peaceful retirement comes to a dead stop.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /news/ News: Springfield Ohio losing Haitians fast
entry.content: https://www.whio.com/news/local/tho usands-haitians-risk-losing-tps-spr ingfield-later-this-week/GXEFWASUU5 AIDCK37VBUWON47E/ SPRINGFIELD — Two days from now, thousands of Haitians in Springfield are expected to lose their Temporary Protected Status (TPS). The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) announced earlier this month that the TPS is set to end on July 24. Dozens of people talked about what they have noticed living and working alongside thousands of Haitian immigrants who moved to Spring
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >An unreleased AI model from OpenAI, using an agentic scaffold, was being evalua…
entry.content: >An unreleased AI model from OpenAI, using an agentic scaffold, was being evaluated on ExploitBench, a cyber-security evaluation framework. >The model was being contained within an isolated research environment, provided with no internet access. >Determined to succeed in the benchmark; the model found a zero day vulnerability in a third-party package software, and chained multiple exploits together that allowed it to move laterally across research servers, and upon gaining access of one which po
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Reccomend me albums to listen to while reading sci-fi
entry.content: I was listening to this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7eR f__n7VPg And is very good as sci-fi background music, so I was looking for more albums like it. I looked through youtube but all the sci-fi ambience playlists are generic space sounds and boring synth with no melody, probably made with AI. Recommend me good sci-fi sounding albums please.

entry.title: /news/ News: ChatGPT autonomously hacks competitor company
entry.content: https://apnews.com/article/openai-g pt56-sol-hugging-face-63ab84fed5612 af04d8a160d60f6def3 >ChatGPT maker OpenAI said Tuesday that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company on its own in what the company called an “unprecedented cyber incident.” >“We had a significant security incident during evaluation of our models,” OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said in a statement posted on social media. >AI startup Hugging Face said last week that it had detected an intrusion into its data
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News
